description: REAL dregg apex shrink proof (BatchStarkProof<DreggOuterConfig> over a real ir2_leaf_wrap apex) WITH the 25-lane chain claim AND the 8-lane apex VK-core (the apex's preprocessed commitment, in-circuit pinned via pin_preprocessed_commit) re-exposed through the shrink proof's own expose_claim table (shrink_apex_to_outer_exposed): pre-FRI transcript events + per-instance table public values + FRI commit-phase data + per-query INPUT-BATCH openings (open_input) for the chain/gnark native verifier.
